search.byImageHint: Ohereza ifoto y'igicuruzwa tubone ibisa nacyo.

hero.slide1Title: Ibikoresho byiza byo mu gikoni, bigezwa i Kigali
hero.slide1Sub: Ibyo guteka, imashini, amashyiga n'ibyo ku meza — ishyura na MTN MoMo cyangwa Airtel Money.
hero.slide2Sub: Ibiciro byiza ku bikoresho byose byo mu gikoni.
hero.slide3Sub: Aho uri hose mu Rwanda — tumiza none, turabikuzanira.

detail.weDeliverText: Ikiguzi cyo kohereza kibarwa hashingiwe aho uri.

howto.title: Uko bagura
howto.subtitle: Kugura kuri twe ni byihuse, byoroshye kandi bitekanye. Kurikiza izi ntambwe.
howto.s1d: Sura cyangwa ushakishe ukoresheje amafilteri kugira ngo ubone ibyo ushaka vuba.
howto.s2d: Wabonye igicuruzwa ukunda? Kanda 'Shyira mu gitebo'. Ushobora kukireba igihe cyose.
howto.s3d: Jya mu gitebo ukande 'Komeza kwishyura', hanyuma wemeze amakuru yawe.
howto.s4d: Hitamo MTN MoMo, Airtel Money, cyangwa wishyure igihe cyo gutanga.
howto.s5d: Ruhuka — igicuruzwa cyawe kibikugezwaho aho uri.

app.title: Gura aho uri hose
app.text: Pakurura porogaramu yacu kugira ngo ugure byoroshye kandi vuba, ufite n'ibiciro byihariye.

contact.title: Dusure cyangwa utwandikire
contact.payments: Twakira MTN Mobile Money na Airtel Money

footer.careText: Ukeneye ubufasha? Itsinda ryacu rihari kuwa Mbere–Cyumweru, 9am–9pm.
